name: HWM_TM_REP_M_PJC_DOC_ATRBS_V
query: SELECT PjcDocAtrbs.tm_rep_atrb_id Pjc_Doc_Time_Repos_Atrb_id, PjcDocAtrbs.attribute_category Pjc_Document_Type, PjcDocAtrbsUsg.usages_source_id, PjcDocAtrbsUsg.usages_source_version FROM HWM_TM_REP_ATRBS PjcDocAtrbs, hwm_tm_rep_atrb_usages PjcDocAtrbsUsg WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM HWM_TM_ATRB_FLDS_B WHERE TM_ATRB_FLD_ID = MASTER_ATTRIBUTE_ID AND name = 'PJC_SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION' ) and PjcDocAtrbs.tm_rep_atrb_id = PjcDocAtrbsUsg.tm_rep_atrb_id
